lesson.menu_title: Who Is Ana, Really? -- Your Life, Not Your Job Title
lesson.menu_desc: Introducing yourself through your town, your house and your dogs -- 32 slides
lesson.subtitle: Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana, Really?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Ana Claudia Veraldi | Lesson 1 -- Who Is Ana, Really?

listenings.text: I lived in the city for almost twenty years, and honestly, I loved it at first. But the noise never stops. The traffic, the neighbors, the construction. One morning I was sitting in traffic for a whole hour and I thought, that is enough. So we moved away. Now I live in a small town with my wife and two cats, and it is completely peaceful. Do I miss the city? A little. I miss the restaurants, and I really miss my old friends. But at the moment I am fixing the roof and painting the kitchen, and I have never been happier.

Saturday is my favorite day. I always take the dogs for a long walk first thing in the morning, before it gets hot. Then I do my chores, which I do not love, but somebody has to do them. In the afternoon I usually work in the garden. These days I am planting vegetables, mostly tomatoes and lettuce, and I am learning as I go. My neighbors are very quiet people. We only really meet at the little market on Sunday morning, and that is perfect for me.

extra_audio.text: First, Tom introduces himself and says where he is from. Then Ana says where she lives and how peaceful the town is. Next, Ana says what she is restoring at home this month. After that, Ana tells him about her dog Mel, who was a stray. Finally, they discover they share the same hobby and agree to swap photos.
